description: Runaway polymerization leading to trapped gas pressure spikes and potential vapor cloud ignition.

rca_pathways.cause_description: Chiller unit trip combined with a blocked Pressure Relief Valve (PRV) causing localized runaway polymerization and gas expansion.
rca_pathways.historical_incident_baseline: Visakhapatnam Styrene Gas Leak Baseline (May 2020) - Auto-polymerization due to temperature control loss and stagnant fluid.
mitigation_actions: IMMEDIATE: Manually actuate deluge cooling system for Tank EQ-STYRENE-TANK-1.
IMMEDIATE: Add inhibitor chemical (TBC) to the tank via emergency injection port.
SECONDARY: Isolate downstream transfer pumps to prevent cavitation.
